name_en: 《Black》Ohanel 25A New Bucket Bag Available|Double Tassels🌟🌟🌟Is this a combination of the wander bag and the frog bag?😼The unique bucket bag style is unforgettable at first sight🫡Bag body made of sheepskin, the gold ring hardware on the back is super cute, the shoulder strap goes through the chain loop. It subverts the traditional backpack type and stands out👍👍Exquisite details everywhere~Cute, classic, and practical, it really hits the spot!!️!!️A must-buy😋 Size: 23x8x25cm
